## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Any speculation is under a `## Speculation` heading and not presented as canon.
- [ ] I did not re-host any artist's work without permission.
- [ ] The page's `updated:` front-matter is set to today's date if I changed the body.
- [ ] I'm OK with my prose being published under CC-BY-SA 4.0 and my code under MIT.
